cards.back: A self-executing program that automates the enforcement and execution of an agreement between parties on a blockchain network.
A software application that runs on a blockchain network, providing a decentralized and secure way to interact with others.
The incentive given to miners for validating transactions and adding them to a block in a blockchain network.
A mechanism used by a blockchain network to achieve consensus among nodes and validate transactions and blocks.
A software program that allows users to store, send, and receive cryptocurrencies and tokens on a blockchain network.
